steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage states the mechanical recycling process has “environmental impact and the loss of material quality.” These specific flaws are what the blank word must describe.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Inadequate means insufficient or not good enough—which is precisely what a process with environmental damage and material loss is.

The other three (resilient, dynamic, satisfactory) are positive or neutral, contradicting those flaws.

That confirms B is correct.
